effect: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn. Then, if you have 10 or more cards in your trash, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.
name: Horse Phantom Blade
trigger: [Trigger] Add up to 1 [Yamato] from your trash to your hand.
